'''Zirulast''' was a terrestrial backwater [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="UAA" /> located in the [[Zirulast system/Legends|Zirulast system]], a part of the [[Belasco sector/Legends|Belasco sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Orbit/Legends|Orbiting]] the [[White dwarf/Legends|white dwarf]] [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Zirulast (star)|same name]],<ref name="UAA" /> Zirulast was situated on the [[Ootmian Pabol/Legends|''Ootmian Pabol'']] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], which connected it to the [[Belasco system/Legends|Belasco system]] as well as the [[New Apsolon system/Legends|New Apsolon system]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> Zirulast was a dry and dusty world encircled by [[Planetary ring/Legends|rings]] of [[Water/Legends|ice]] particles. The [[Temolak]]s, [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] speaking the [[Temolish]] [[Language/Legends|language]], were native to the planet, evolving redundant internal organs in order to survive the rigors of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].<ref name="UAA" />

In [[2000 BBY/Legends|2000 BBY]], the water supply of Zirulast evaporated, leading the Temolaks to build orbital [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]] for the purpose of extracting water from the icy rings surrounding the planet. Subsequently, the natives of Zirulast acquired [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology, after which many members of the [[Species/Legends|species]] became interstellar [[Scavenger/Legends|scavengers]]. Those who did rarely returned to Zirulast except to [[Merchant/Legends|sell]] their scavenged goods.<ref name="UAA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zirulast was created for ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'', a [[2003]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] sourcebook for use with the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="UAA" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Zirulast [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square P-11.<ref name="TEA" />
